name: zaza-draft-signal-engine
description: Internal human-in-the-loop signal interpretation and content preparation system for Zaza Draft.

scripts.test:bridge: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.test-dist',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && npx tsc -p tsconfig.bridge-tests.json && node -e "const { readdirSync } = require('fs'); const { execFileSync } = require('child_process'); const files = readdirSync('.test-dist/tests').filter((file) => file.endsWith('.test.js')).map((file) => `.test-dist/tests/${file}`); execFileSync(process.execPath, ['--test', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit' });" && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.test-dist',{ recursive: true, force: true })"
